title: Representation of deceased persons only
doc_html:
Art. 886. Representation of deceased persons only

           Only deceased persons may be represented.

           Acts 1981, No. 919, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1982.
doc_text:
Art. 886.  Representation of deceased persons only
Only deceased persons may be represented.
Acts 1981, No. 919, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1982.
